Off Calendar Aug-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sara M. Peters, Esq., from Walkup, Melodia, Kelly & Schoenberger, 415-981-7210, for plaintiff and moving party
Andrea J. Casalett, Esq., from McKenna Long & Aldridge, 415-267-4094; for Lana Beckett, defendant and opposing party

ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFF MARION COPE's Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents From Defendant Lana Beckett. Granted; defendant must produce the e-mails. Either they do not qualify for work-product protection or, to the extent any protection could apply, it has been waived by dissemination. No sanctions. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. (301/PJB)
